v2_entitlements_period_order_check.name: v2_entitlements_period_order_check
v2_entitlements_period_order_check.value: "v2_entitlements"."current_period_start" is null or "v2_entitlements"."current_period_end" is null or "v2_entitlements"."current_period_start" <= "v2_entitlements"."current_period_end"

v2_messages_agent_run_segment_scope_chec.name: v2_messages_agent_run_segment_scope_check
v2_messages_agent_run_segment_scope_chec.value: ("v2_messages"."agent_run_segment" = 0 and "v2_messages"."agent_run_segment_final") or ("v2_messages"."role" = 'assistant' and "v2_messages"."agent_run_id" is not null)

v2_projects_workspace_slug_canonical_che.name: v2_projects_workspace_slug_canonical_check
v2_projects_workspace_slug_canonical_che.value:
octet_length("v2_projects"."workspace_slug") between 38 and 64
        and right("v2_projects"."workspace_slug", 37) = '-' || "v2_projects"."id"::text
        and left("v2_projects"."workspace_slug", length("v2_projects"."workspace_slug") - 37)
          ~ '^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$'

v2_projects_settings_default_model_check.name: v2_projects_settings_default_model_check
v2_projects_settings_default_model_check.value:
not ("v2_projects"."settings" ? 'defaultModel') or (
        jsonb_typeof("v2_projects"."settings" -> 'defaultModel') = 'string'
        and char_length("v2_projects"."settings" ->> 'defaultModel') <= 200
        and "v2_projects"."settings" ->> 'defaultModel'
          ~ '^(anthropic|deepseek|google|openai|openrouter)/[^[:space:]]+$'
      )

v2_provider_keys_disabled_pair_check.name: v2_provider_keys_disabled_pair_check
v2_provider_keys_disabled_pair_check.value: ("v2_provider_keys"."disabled_at" is null and "v2_provider_keys"."disabled_reason" is null) or ("v2_provider_keys"."disabled_at" is not null and "v2_provider_keys"."disabled_reason" is not null)

v2_provider_keys_revalidation_lease_pair.name: v2_provider_keys_revalidation_lease_pair_check
v2_provider_keys_revalidation_lease_pair.value: ("v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_claimed_at" is null and "v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_lease_token" is null) or ("v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_claimed_at" is not null and "v2_provider_keys"."revalidation_lease_token" is not null)

v2_resource_deletion_jobs_lease_check.name: v2_resource_deletion_jobs_lease_check
v2_resource_deletion_jobs_lease_check.value:
(
        ("v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."status" = 'leased' and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_token" is not null and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
        or
        ("v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."status" <> 'leased' and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_token" is null and "v2_resource_deletion_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null)
      )

v2_retention_jobs_activation_cursor_chec.name: v2_retention_jobs_activation_cursor_check
v2_retention_jobs_activation_cursor_chec.value:
(
        ("v2_retention_jobs"."activation_cursor_event" is null and "v2_retention_jobs"."activation_cursor_user_id" is null)
        or
        (
          "v2_retention_jobs"."phase" = 'activation'
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."activation_cursor_event" in ('retention_d7', 'retention_d28', 'first_week_mau')
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."activation_cursor_user_id" is not null
        )
      )

v2_retention_jobs_phase_cursor_check.name: v2_retention_jobs_phase_cursor_check
v2_retention_jobs_phase_cursor_check.value:
(
        ("v2_retention_jobs"."phase" = 'activation')
        or
        ("v2_retention_jobs"."phase" = 'cleanup' and "v2_retention_jobs"."activation_cursor_event" is null and "v2_retention_jobs"."activation_cursor_user_id" is null)
      )

v2_retention_jobs_lease_check.name: v2_retention_jobs_lease_check
v2_retention_jobs_lease_check.value:
(
        (
          "v2_retention_jobs"."status" = 'leased'
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."release_version_id" is not null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."lease_token" is not null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."completed_at" is null
        )
        or
        (
          "v2_retention_jobs"."status" = 'queued'
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."release_version_id" is null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."lease_token" is null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."completed_at" is null
        )
        or
        (
          "v2_retention_jobs"."status" = 'complete'
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."release_version_id" is null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."lease_token" is null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null
          and "v2_retention_jobs"."completed_at" is not null
        )
      )

v2_threads_launch_default_model_check.name: v2_threads_launch_default_model_check
v2_threads_launch_default_model_check.value:
"v2_threads"."launch_intent" is null or not ("v2_threads"."launch_intent" ? 'defaultModel') or (
        jsonb_typeof("v2_threads"."launch_intent" -> 'defaultModel') = 'string'
        and char_length("v2_threads"."launch_intent" ->> 'defaultModel') <= 200
        and "v2_threads"."launch_intent" ->> 'defaultModel'
          ~ '^(anthropic|deepseek|google|openai|openrouter)/[^[:space:]]+$'
      )

v2_user_deletion_jobs_lease_check.name: v2_user_deletion_jobs_lease_check
v2_user_deletion_jobs_lease_check.value:
(
        ("v2_user_deletion_jobs"."status" = 'leased' and "v2_user_deletion_jobs"."lease_token" is not null and "v2_user_deletion_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
        or
        ("v2_user_deletion_jobs"."status" <> 'leased' and "v2_user_deletion_jobs"."lease_token" is null and "v2_user_deletion_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null)
      )

v2_user_deletion_refund_intents_provider.name: v2_user_deletion_refund_intents_provider_check
v2_user_deletion_refund_intents_provider.value:
(
        ("v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."provider_refund_id" is null and "v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."provider_status" is null and "v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."reconciled_at" is null)
        or
        ("v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."provider_refund_id" is not null and length(btrim("v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."provider_refund_id")) > 0 and "v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."provider_status" is not null and "v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."provider_status" in ('pending', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'canceled') and "v2_user_deletion_refund_intents"."reconciled_at" is not null)
      )
